name: Aoyuan Beauty Valley Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Aoyuan Beauty Valley Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the investment, development, and operation of real estate properties in China. The company is involved in research and development, and manufacture of bio-based fiber and material series products; and the investment, construction, and operation of the theme town and the idyllic complex. It also acts as a general contractor for building construction. The company was formerly known as Kinghand Industrial Investment Group Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Aoyuan Beauty Valley Technology Co., Ltd. in November 2020. Aoyuan Beauty Valley Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Xiangyang, China.
